Web Development

Tech Stacks.

Mobile App Development

Proficient in using Java to develop Android applications and using Swift to create and deploy iOS applications.

Frontend Development

Skilled in using React for frontend development and deployment of web applications.

About.

I believe in the power of interdisciplinary integration to spark innovation and solve complex problems. As a developer, designer, and HCI engineer, I strive for the harmonious blend of technology and aesthetics, always prioritizing user-centric approaches to create intuitive, efficient, and delightful interactive experiences. By merging knowledge and skills from various fields, I aim to design products that are not only functionally robust but also visually appealing, providing genuine value to users. Currently, I am a Master's student at Zhejiang University, where I continue to develop my expertise and pursue cutting-edge research in these areas. My guiding principles include innovation-driven exploration, user-first design, balanced aesthetics and functionality, and continuous learning to stay at the forefront of my fields, thus driving the evolution of human-computer interaction through impactful creations.
